subtitles.herobrine_arrive: has arrived from the §4Herobrine Vessel Realm§r.
subtitles.armored_herobrine_spawn: Anyone who stands in my way must die !
subtitles.herobrine_chris_say_weak: You are weak , you are nothing !!!
subtitles.herobrine_clone_die: The clone has been destroyed, data has been transmitted to the terminal.
subtitles.bbq_retreat: I'm going to call for help!
subtitles.bbq_sauce_squad_arrived: The Sauce Squad has arrived. We're coming, Hot Sauce!
subtitles.blue_demon_retreat: The world will be able to recover once I am finished
subtitles.herobrine_retreat: was sent back to the §4Herobrine Vessel Realm§r
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.obsidian_weapo: An Obsidian Block infused with §5Herobrine§r's power.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.shadow_obsidia: A Shadow Obsidian Block infused with §5Herobrine§r's power.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.bedrock_weapon:
Forged from §7the hardest block§r known to exist.
No one knows how §5Herobrine§r obtained it.
Can mine anything.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.shadow_obsidia:
One of the §5Shadow Herobrine§r's weapon.
Combine it with a Diamond Helmet or Diamond Chestplate in the Smithing Table, using a Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template, to craft the §5Herobrine Obsidian Diamond Armor§r.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.herobrine_ende:
An Ender Eye infused with §5Herobrine§r's power
§7(While in your inventory)§r
§6Special Attack§r when not holding this weapon to shoot 3 Shadow Obsidian Pillars.
§6Special Attack§r when holding this weapon to activate Shadow Obsidian Machine Gun.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.demoniac_volta: A fragment of the Demoniac Voltage Reaver, forged from a magnetic alloy of iron and blended obsidian.
A shattered fragment of the Demoniac Voltage Reaver, forged from a magnetic alloy of iron and blended obsidian.
The hilt of the Demoniac Voltage Reaver, forged from blended obsidian.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.compressessed_: Compressed Diamond: Highest Quality, Maximum Hardness
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.woopie_the_swo: A special weapon that can unleash a skill by right-clicking while sprinting after hitting an enemy.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.diamond_shear: Right-click to clear all effects from enemy.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.wooden_door: An incredibly quirky wooden door, even noobs say it's great.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.trapdoor: This is just a normal trapdoor.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.ladder: You should put this back in your house.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.enchanted_ende: This is an Ender Pearl enchanted to ignore fall damage.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.villager_head: A tool for disguising as a villager. Right-click to equip. Sneak + Right-click to toggle Disguise/Attack mode.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.enchanted_bed: Right-click the Enchanted Bed once to set your respawn point. Upon death, you won't drop your items. You must right-click it again after each use to reactivate the effect. Conflicts with the Totem of Undying.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.shadow_obsidia: Shadow Obsidian Fired by Shadow Herobrine's Clone
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.blue_demon_tri:
Equip 2 fully charged §bBlue Demon§r Tridents to unlock Trident Festival in Ranged Style.
While holding this item during a thunderstorm, you have a high chance of being struck by lightning. Being struck by lightning charges it.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.blue_demon_che:
Taking damage builds up charge. When fully charged HOLD Special Attack to activate buff.

During the buff, enemies that hit the wielder have chance to become §bElectrified§r. Nearby tridents are pulled toward you and heal the wielder.
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.future_update: §4This weapon currently has no abilities and will be updated along with its corresponding character.§r
tooltip.annoyingvillagers.beta_update: §6This weapon currently has no abilities and will be updated soon.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.kick.tooltip: Kick enemies and drain their stamina.
skill.annoyingvillagers.stun_escape.tool: Press Kick while stunned or guard-break to roll backward, or hold A/D + Kick to wake up left/right to avoid being executed. Grants Slowness II, Weakness II and Mining Fatigue II for 3s.
skill.annoyingvillagers.crafting_table: Stop Swinging Me, Let Me Craft
skill.annoyingvillagers.wooden_door: Put Me Back In Your House
skill.annoyingvillagers.trapdoor: This is Not A Real Door
skill.annoyingvillagers.ladder: Place Me On A Wall, Not A Face
skill.annoyingvillagers.bedrock_weapon.t: Enter auto parry (15 seconds), fully §7blocks§r§8 all damage and §r§7heals§r§8 2 HP per block.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.demoniac_voltage:
Attacks nearby entities and §7drains stamina§r§8 on hit.§r

§5Snake Blade Guard§r§8 (Guard with Innate)§r
§8Block all incoming damage, damaging and draining stamina of nearby entities.§r

§7Hitting enemies with Snake Blade charges your Innate Skill.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.ender_aegis.tool:
Enter Second Form (10 seconds)
Normal Attacks release a §7Shockwave§r§8 that §r§6knocks down§r§8 entities in its path.§r
§8Blocking damage also releases a §r§7Shockwave§r§8 and §r§6extends the duration§r.

§7Blocking damage charges your Innate Skill.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.ender_glaive.too:
Shoot a §7purple explosive blast§r§8 that §r§6knocks down§r§8 impacted enemies and pushes you forward.§r

§5Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate)
Fires a §7purple explosive blast§r§8 and pulls you backward.§r

§7Hitting an enemy with the explosion charges your Innate Skill.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.ender_slayer_scy:
Enter Second Form (20 seconds)

§5Normal Attacks§r
§8Command the dragon to fire a §r§7Lightning Beam§r§8, dealing §6moderate damage, locking the target's movement, and draining stamina§r

§5Right Click§r
§8Command a §r§7Meteor§r§8 from the dragon, dealing §6high damage§r.

§5Special Attack§r
§8Call the Dragon to land down and §r§6mount§r§8 you up.§r

§7Successfully dodging charges your Innate Skill and extends the duration.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.great_sword.tool:
Summon A Shield and auto parry (8 seconds)
§7Fully blocks all damage§r§8 and §r§7extends the duration§r§8 per block.§r
Leap into the air and crash down with a fully powered Awakening Strike, triggering an §7Earthquake§r§8 on impact that §r§6knocks down§r§8 all enemies caught in the shockwave.§r

§6Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate)§r
§7Teleport§r§8 to your last hit target, then slam down with a fully powered Awakening Strike, triggering an §7Earthquake§r§8 on impact that §r§6knocks down§r§8 all enemies caught in the shockwave.§r

§6Trident Style§r§8§r
§8Using this weapon with §bBlue Demon§r§8 Trident in offhand can perform §r§7Electric Field§r§8 by Special Attack + Innate, using Special Attack will throw a trident.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.null_weapon.tool:
Release Null Weapons to attack nearby enemies (15 seconds)
The number of weapons released scales with §7Innate Stacks§r.§8 Unlock all Normal Attack, Dash Attack, and Air Slash animations.§r

§5Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate)
Summon a §7Wither Skeleton§r.

§7Hitting enemies with Null Weapons charges your Innate Skill.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.obsidian_sledgeh:
Enter Second Form (10 seconds)
Normal Attacks release a §7Meteorite§r§8, dealing §r§6moderate damage§r

§5Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate) releases a §r§7Meteorite§r§8, dealing §r§6high damage§r§8 and §r§6stunning the enemy.§r

§7Hitting enemies with Meteorite charges your Innate Skill.§r
Summon an §7Obsidian Wall§r§8.§r

§7Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate) Summon an §7Obsidian Cross§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.shadow_obsidian_:
Summon a §7Shadow Obsidian Streak§r§8.§r

§7Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate) Summon an §7Obsidian Wall§r

Summon a §7Shadow Obsidian Streak§r§8 and a §7Shadow Obsidian Ring§r§8.§r

§7Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate) Summon an §7Obsidian Wall§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.woopie_the_sword:
Fire a Wind Orb that blasts nearby enemies into the air.
§7Hitting an enemy with the Wind Orb recharges your Innate.§r

§6Special Innate§r§8 (Special Attack + Innate)
Harness the wind to dash forward a long distance, damaging enemies you pass through.
§r§7Any hit during the dash instantly recharges your Innate.§r
skill.annoyingvillagers.crafting_table.t: Slam the Crafting Table into your enemy's face
skill.annoyingvillagers.wooden_door.tool: Slam the Wooden Door into your enemy's face
skill.annoyingvillagers.trapdoor.tooltip: Slam the Trapdoor into your enemy's face.
skill.annoyingvillagers.ladder.tooltip: Slam the Ladder into your enemy's face
skill.annoyingvillagers.trident_festival:
This weapon has 2 styles, press §7Special Attack§r§8 to switch between them.§r

§bMelee Style§r
§8Unleashes an §7Electric Field§r§8 around the wielder and at any grounded Trident thrown in §bRanged Style§r§8. Entities hit are §7Electrified§r§8.

§bRanged Style§r
§8Commands all nearby grounded Tridents to strike nearby enemies and summons a §7Lightning Bolt§r§8 at each Trident. Targets hit are §7Electrified§r§8.

§bTrident Festival§r
§8Unleashes an §7Electric Field§r§8 around the wielder, then commands all nearby grounded Tridents to strike nearby enemies and summons a §7Lightning Bolt§r§8 and an §7Explosion§r§8 at each Trident.

§7Automatically blocks incoming projectiles from the front while running.§r
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay.1: Just laying down a bit, nothing to worry about.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay.2: Oof... I need to lay flat for a sec.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay.4: Don't step on me, I'm laying here!
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay.7: This is my combat strategy: play dead.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay.11: The floor is oddly comfortable today.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay.20: You wish you were this chill.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sleep.2: I was not sleeping, I was... recharging.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sleep.4: Don't wake me unless it's urgent.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sleep.10: Wake me up when it's diamond o'clock.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sleep.11: You ever nap in full armor? No? Weak.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sleep.13: Yes, I sleep with one eye open.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sleep.17: I fought, I survived, I nap.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.2: Taking a break from saving the world.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.3: Is it weird to sit here? Nah.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.4: Sit down and appreciate nature with me.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.5: I claim this patch of grass.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.8: Big brain thoughts happen in this pose.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.9: This seat is taken. By me.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.10: I'm not lazy, I'm energy efficient.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.11: Sometimes you gotta sit to reflect.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.13: I'm too cool to stand up right now.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.16: Low center of gravity, maximum chill.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.19: Oh I just sit here, don't kill me!
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit.20: If you can't beat them, sit near them.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.2: I sit like no one's watching.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.5: Bet you can't sit this fabulously.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.8: I'm not just sitting. I'm entertaining.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.10: Join me, let's sit funny together!
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.11: Why sit boring when you can sit awesome?
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.13: This is my emote of power.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.19: This is what peak performance looks like.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_sit.20: If sitting was an art, I'm Picasso.
idle.annoyingvillagers.slight.2: That was barely an emote, but I meant it.
idle.annoyingvillagers.slight.3: Did you see that? Blink and you miss it.
idle.annoyingvillagers.slight.5: I call that a slight vibe.
idle.annoyingvillagers.slight.10: The art of the subtle flex.
idle.annoyingvillagers.slight.12: Just making sure you're paying attention.
idle.annoyingvillagers.slight.18: Blink and you'll miss this drip.
idle.annoyingvillagers.push_up.1: One! Two! Ugh, who needs cardio?
idle.annoyingvillagers.push_up.2: I do push-ups to impress the mobs.
idle.annoyingvillagers.push_up.11: Push-ups make me immune to arrows.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay_relax_emote.1: Now this is a proper rest pose.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay_relax_emote.3: Don't mind me, I'm just relaxing elegantly.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay_relax_emote.6: This pose adds plus ten chill.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay_relax_emote.7: A little stretch, a little rest.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay_relax_emote.8: I'm not lazy, I'm recharging in style.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay_relax_emote.1: Look at this posture. Pure class.
The ground and I have an understanding.
Even heroes need a comfy pose.
This is what emotional recovery looks like.
idle.annoyingvillagers.lay_relax_emote.2: Leave me here. I look cool.
idle.annoyingvillagers.one_arm_lay_emote: I'm relaxing, but make it dramatic.
This pose says I know what I'm doing.
I only need one arm to look this cool.
Style points matter, even on the ground.
I could nap like this for hours.
This pose took years of practice.
Witness the power of a comfortable elbow.
If grace had a pose, this is it.
I'm making the dirt look fancy.
idle.annoyingvillagers.salute_left_hand_: Left-hand salute, same respect.
Precision matters, no matter the hand.
A salute is a salute. Pay attention.
Form first, questions later.
Still disciplined, just mirrored.
Respect delivered from the left flank.
Saluting with style and balance.
The left hand deserves glory too.
Do not underestimate symmetrical honor.
A proper salute never goes out of fashion.
I can show respect from either side.
Left hand, straight posture, serious business.
You noticed the hand swap? Good.
Order and discipline from a new angle.
This salute is one hundred percent intentional.
Even my off-side looks professional.
Respect isn't hand-specific.
Try doing this without looking awesome.
Sharp salute, steady spirit.
Honor, but slightly to the left.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sit_no_weapon_emo: No weapon, no problem. I'm just chilling.
See? Peaceful posture.
I left the violence at home.
Hands empty, mind calm.
A rare moment of non-threatening energy.
No sword today. Just vibes.
This is my unarmed negotiation stance.
I come in peace... for now.
Nothing in my hands except confidence.
Relax, I'm not swinging at anyone.
This pose says civilized conversation.
No weapon equipped, maximum trust issues.
Even fighters deserve a peaceful sit.
No blade, no bow, just me.
Taking a break from carrying sharp objects.
I look less dangerous like this, right?
Unarmed and unusually polite.
For once, nobody's getting bonked.
This is my disarmament program.
A calm sit hits different without gear.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.1: Some days just feel heavier than others.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.3: Not every battle is won with swords.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.6: This world can be cruel sometimes.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.7: Leave me to my thoughts for a bit.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.9: I'm carrying too much on my mind.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.10: This isn't pain you can bandage.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.11: I laugh a lot, but not today.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.13: I just want a little peace.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.14: There's no shame in feeling broken.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.15: I thought I was stronger than this.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.18: Not every hurt leaves a mark.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.19: Give me a moment to breathe.
idle.annoyingvillagers.sorrow_emote.20: I'll stand again, just not yet.
idle.annoyingvillagers.surrender_emote.2: Hands up! No need to make this worse.
idle.annoyingvillagers.surrender_emote.4: Let's all calm down for a second.
idle.annoyingvillagers.surrender_emote.6: Mercy sounds pretty good right now.
idle.annoyingvillagers.surrender_emote.8: Look, my hands are up. That's sincerity.
idle.annoyingvillagers.surrender_emote.1: Let's not turn this into a tragedy.
This is me officially giving up.
You win. Please stop proving it.
No tricks, no weapons, no bad ideas.
Everybody relax! Especially the one attacking me.
I'm choosing peace at high volume.
There will be no heroic comeback today.
idle.annoyingvillagers.attention_emote.1: Still as stone, sharp as steel.
idle.annoyingvillagers.attention_emote.2: This is what readiness looks like.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.2: I call this the panic bird technique.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.4: Flap harder! Maybe it'll work this time.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.5: Who needs dignity when you have wings in spirit?
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.8: These arms are doing their best.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.9: I trained under very confused chickens.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.10: If enthusiasm could fly, I'd be gone.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.13: I believe in myself more than physics does.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.14: This is either art or a crisis.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.15: I'm one flap away from greatness.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.16: Don't laugh, this is serious bird business.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.17: The sky rejected me, but I persist.
idle.annoyingvillagers.flapping_emote.20: Maybe if I keep doing this, gravity will apologize.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.1: Woooo! That was a good jump!
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.4: That little hop fixed my mood.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.5: Happiness is stored in the knees.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.7: This is how I celebrate being alive.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.9: You can hear the joy in that landing.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.10: A fun jump a day keeps the gloom away.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.11: I regret nothing about that bounce.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.12: Just adding some extra excitement to the day.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.19: Jumping because standing was too boring.
idle.annoyingvillagers.fun_jump_emote.20: That hop was full of emotional damage recovery.
idle.annoyingvillagers.jump_emote.2: A clean jump. Simple and effective.
idle.annoyingvillagers.jump_emote.7: A proper jump keeps the blood moving.
idle.annoyingvillagers.jump_emote.9: Nothing wrong with a little lift.
idle.annoyingvillagers.jump_emote.12: A small leap, a better view.
idle.annoyingvillagers.jump_emote.13: Just checking if gravity still works.
idle.annoyingvillagers.jump_emote.17: A little air clears the mind.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.3: Hard to hit what hugs the ground.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.7: The dirt is my ally now.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.9: You can't miss what you can barely see.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.11: I prefer my danger at ground level.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.14: This pose says I take survival seriously.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.15: Sometimes the smartest move is downward.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.16: If chaos happens, I'm already prepared.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.17: Stealth begins with a lower silhouette.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.18: Call it prone, call it genius.
idle.annoyingvillagers.prone_emote.19: This is not fear. This is strategy.
idle.annoyingvillagers.salute_emote.4: A sharp salute for a serious moment.
idle.annoyingvillagers.salute_emote.14: This salute is for the brave.
idle.annoyingvillagers.salute_emote.18: Hold the line and hold the salute.
idle.annoyingvillagers.salute_emote.20: Straight back, steady hand, clear purpose.
